statement: A block of mass 10 kg rests on a frictionless horizontal surface. A horizontal force of 50 N is applied to the right. Find the acceleration of the block.
common_student_errors: Including gravity or the normal force in ΣFx = ma (they act vertically and cancel out)
Forgetting to convert mass to kg if given in other units
Dividing force by g instead of mass when computing acceleration
